title: Ask HN: Alternative Careers in the Age of AI
excerpt: I'm about to lose my job to AI and offshoring - a job that started well, but which I ended up less than ecstatic about. I'm wondering - what else can a software developer do that isn't also vulnerable to AI? Whenever you Google this, you get things like "Manager", "Product Manager" etc., but it strikes me that if software engineering is decimated by AI then many of these roles may be next in line - as is most "pure" knowledge work.
content_html:
Ask HN: Alternative Careers in the Age of AI
10 points by helpfulmandrill 23 hours ago | hide | past | favorite | 11 comments

I'm about to lose my job to AI and offshoring - a job that started well, but which I ended up less than ecstatic about. I'm wondering - what else can a software developer do that isn't also vulnerable to AI? Whenever you Google this, you get things like "Manager", "Product Manager" etc., but it strikes me that if software engineering is decimated by AI then many of these roles may be next in line - as is most "pure" knowledge work.

So I'm asking, what is the escape hatch? Do we all become plumbers? Anyone have a plan?

 help

sentences.en: I'm wondering - what else can a software developer do that isn't also vulnerable to AI?
sentences.zh: 我想知道 - 软件开发人员还能做什么而不容易受到人工智能的影响？

sentences.en: Whenever you Google this, you get things like "Manager", "Product Manager" etc., but it strikes me that if software engineering is decimated by AI then many of these roles may be next in line - as is most "pure" knowledge work.So I'm asking, what is the escape hatch?
sentences.zh: 每当你用谷歌搜索这个时，你都会得到诸如“经理”、“产品经理”等之类的词，但令我震惊的是，如果软件工程被人工智能摧毁，那么许多这些角色可能会排在下一个位置——就像大多数“纯粹”的知识工作一样。所以我问，逃生舱口是什么？

blocks.html_en:
I'm about to lose my job to AI and offshoring - a job that started well, but which I ended up less than ecstatic about. I'm wondering - what else can a software developer do that isn't also vulnerable to AI? Whenever you Google this, you get things like "Manager", "Product Manager" etc., but it strikes me that if software engineering is decimated by AI then many of these roles may be next in line - as is most "pure" knowledge work.

So I'm asking, what is the escape hatch? Do we all become plumbers? Anyone have a plan?

content_html_zh: 问 HN：人工智能时代的另类职业10 分，作者：helpfulmandrill 23 小时前 |隐藏 |过去|最喜欢 | 11 条评论 我即将因为人工智能和离岸外包而失去工作——这份工作一开始很顺利，但最终我却并不那么欣喜若狂。 我想知道 - 软件开发人员还能做什么而不容易受到人工智能的影响？ 每当你用谷歌搜索这个时，你都会得到诸如“经理”、“产品经理”等之类的词，但令我震惊的是，如果软件工程被人工智能摧毁，那么许多这些角色可能会排在下一个位置——就像大多数“纯粹”的知识工作一样。所以我问，逃生舱口是什么？ 我们都成为水管工吗？ 有人有计划吗？ 帮助
